query:
SELECT 
  id, 
  totalAmount,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'payment') as totalPayments,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'discount') as totalDiscounts,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'surcharge') as totalSurcharges,
  (CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'surcharge') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'discount') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'payment')) as calculatedBalance
FROM projects 
WHERE id = 2130117;

  totalAmount,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'payment') as totalPayments,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'discount') as totalDiscounts,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'surcharge') as totalSurcharges,
  (CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(12,2)) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'surcharge') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'discount') - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM payments WHERE projectId = projects.id AND movementType = 'payment')) as calculatedBalance
FROM projects 
WHERE id = 2130117;
